commands.purpose: Table view of health_checks. Filterable by tenant, check_type, is_enabled, last_run_status. --unhealthy filters last_run_status IN ('degraded', 'unhealthy', 'timeout', 'error'). Shows the denormalized last_run_at + last_run_status + consecutive_failure_count per row.
Verbose read of one health check: config + last 24 hours of runs + status timeline + attached alert policies (via signal_source lookup). Support tool for investigating a specific check's health.

Manual trigger of a specific health check. Dispatches RunHealthCheckJob immediately (bypasses the schedule). --wait blocks + prints the run outcome (used for ops one-off validation). Rate-limited by monitoring.rate_limit middleware to prevent test spam.
Alert view. Default filter: --status=firing. Filterable by tenant, severity, policy_id, date range. Ops uses this for on-call triage.

Manually acknowledge an alert. Sets status='acknowledged' + acknowledged_by_user_id = current user + acknowledged_at = now(). --note is optional but recommended. Used by ops via CLI when the SDUI is unreachable.

Manually resolve an alert. Sets status='resolved' + resolved_by='manual' + resolved_at + resolved_by_user_id. --note is required and written to the audit trail. Triggers the incident auto-resolve path if this was the last firing alert in the incident.
Incident timeline view. --unresolved filters to open incidents (status IN 'open', 'acknowledged', 'investigating', 'mitigating'). Sorted by opened_at DESC.
Manually acknowledge an incident (takes ownership + cancels escalation). Sets status='acknowledged'. --note optional.

Manually resolve an incident. Sets status='resolved' + resolved_at. --note required. --postmortem-url optional (auto-populates postmortem_url for P1 incidents). Triggers MonitoringPostmortemRequiredNotification when severity=p1 + no --postmortem-url was provided.

Provider config view. --active filters is_active=true; --test-mode filters test_mode=true; --breaker-open filters circuit_breaker_state='open'. Shows enabled_severities per row + circuit-breaker state.

Scriptable provider config create/update. --config-file=path/to/config.json is validated against the per-provider JSON schema. --dry-run validates + shows diff without persisting. Encrypts the config at rest.
Send a synthetic P4 test alert via the provider's sandbox / test endpoint. Reports success/failure with provider response details. Rate-limited by monitoring.rate_limit middleware.

Manually reset an OPEN circuit breaker. Sets circuit_breaker_state='closed' + circuit_breaker_open_until=NULL + consecutive_failure_count=0 + increments circuit_breaker_reset_count. --note is required (audit trail).

Compliance report. Counts monitoring_alerts rows with status='suppressed' grouped by (policy_id, suppression_reason). Used by DPO / ops audit — evidence that suppression rules are working correctly + not silencing legitimate alerts.
